title: Harden snapshot Git provenance status
goal: Require explicit provenance/freshness status fields and avoid invented freshness when Git is unavailable

acceptance.assertion: The slice is implemented or explicitly closed against current main/PR state with no hidden broadening.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: RepoBrief boundaries are preserved: no hidden refresh, no Git mutation in RepoBrief core, no review/runtime correctness claim.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Relevant tests/checks are run, or a precise blocker/gap is recorded.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: The output states what the evidence does not establish.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.outcome: Lenskit PR #896 implemented explicit snapshot_provenance status for generated RepoBrief bundle manifests.

acceptance_summary: snapshot_provenance v1 emitted in bundle manifests
per-repository provenance fields include repo_root, repo_remote, git_commit, git_dirty, git_branch, provenance_status and freshness_basis
missing or unavailable git provenance keeps freshness_basis unknown
